ddls:
CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., BMI, ROLE) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code representing the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric category */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES metric_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding metric */,
  "num_calls" INTEGER /* Number of calls associated with the metric */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the call period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the call period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding metric */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Increase By, Replace Base) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount associated with the action (e.g., percentage or dollar) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the action period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the action period */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the manager oversees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance log */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric value was recorded */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metric at that date */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the metric value (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding metric */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message to display when the alert is triggered */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding metric */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "previous_value" TEXT /* Value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* Value after the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the action */,
  "affected_row" INTEGER /* ID of the row affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authentication */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Date of the last synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
